{"id":"smallhold-vi4","title":"NodeInfo 2.0: accurate usage stats, correct schema","description":"Implement /.well-known/nodeinfo (link document) and /nodeinfo/2.0 (data). users.total is hardcoded to 1 regardless of persona count (intentional — don't leak persona count to aggregators). localPosts from COUNT(*) of posts table. software.version from CARGO_PKG_VERSION.

Test discipline:
- Validate response against NodeInfo 2.0 JSON schema (include schema in test as reference)
- Test that users.total is 1 even when 5 personas exist
- Test that localPosts increments after creating a post

Defensive programming:
- openRegistrations: always false — never read from config, hardcoded
- Cache localPosts count (COUNT(*) can be expensive at scale — use approximate or cached value)","acceptance_criteria":"Response validates against NodeInfo 2.0 schema; users.total always 1; localPosts accurate; version matches Cargo.toml","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:19Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:19Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4uc","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:33Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
